input.background: Ninety and 95 percent confidence intervals for the alcohol and esophageal cancer illustrative case-control data are calculated.
input.question: Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the odds ratio (OR).

alcohol.description: The level or presence of alcohol consumption in the case-control study.

esophageal_cancer.description: The presence or absence of esophageal cancer in the case-control study.

odds_ratio.description: The odds ratio calculated from the case-control data, representing the odds of esophageal cancer given alcohol consumption.

meta_info.caption: Confidence interval for the odds ratio (Alcohol and  esophageal cancer).
